LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PETITIONER DANIEL ZAVALA'S MOTION FOR RULING ON VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER DANIEL ZAVALA'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS DENIED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Ruling On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. LINA BALCIUNAS COCKRELL, ESQ. of Messing Adam & Jasmine LLP (Tel: 916-446-5297) appearing for and with petitioner DANIEL ZAVALA;
Assistant Chief Counsel JANIE HICKOK SIESS, ESQ. of the California Department of Corrrections and Rehabilitation Office of Legal Affairs, Employment Advocacy and Prosecution Team (Tel: 916-255-1309) appearing via CourtCall for Real Party in Interest California Department of Corrections and Rehabilitation.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER DANIEL ZAVALA'S Motion For Ruling On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

Matter is argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner Daniel Zavala's verified petition for writ of mandamus is denied. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
